name: audit-safe-document-extractor
description: Navigation Enhancements & Automatic Test Versioning (Phase 42: Release Management)

scripts.build: tsc && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs && node scripts/fix-tsconfig-paths.mjs
scripts.sync:versions: npm version patch --allow-same-version && cd frontend && npm version patch --allow-same-version && cd ..
scripts.build:metadata: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { BuildMetadataService } from './src/infrastructure/services/build-metadata.service'; new BuildMetadataService().exportMetadata('build-metadata.json').then(() => process.exit(0))"
scripts.build:with-check: npm run verify:versions && npm run build
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api:14a && npm run test:api:14b && npm run test:api:14c && npm run test:api:14-e2e
scripts.test:phase16:all: npm run test:phase16:e2e && npm run test:phase16:audit
scripts.test:governance:export: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { TestGovernanceFramework } from './src/infrastructure/governance'; const fw = new TestGovernanceFramework(); const report = fw.getLatestReport(); if(report) fw.exportReportAsJSON(report, 'test-results/governance-report.json')"
scripts.test:issues:report: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { issueManager } from './src/infrastructure/issue-tracking'; const summary = issueManager.getSummary(); console.log(JSON.stringify(summary, null, 2))"
scripts.registry:summary: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { testRegistry } from './src/infrastructure/test-registry'; const summary = testRegistry.calculateSummary(); console.log(JSON.stringify(summary, null, 2))"
scripts.registry:health: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { testRegistryManager } from './src/infrastructure/test-registry'; const report = testRegistryManager.generateHealthReport(); console.log(JSON.stringify(report.statistics, null, 2))"
scripts.environment:report: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f='test-results/environment-report.json';if(fs.existsSync(f))console.log(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));else console.log('Run npm run environment:run first')"
scripts.api:governance: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { runApiDiscoveryPipeline, integrateWithGovernance } from './src/infrastructure/api-discovery'; (async()=>{await runApiDiscoveryPipeline('http://localhost:3000','test-results'); await integrateWithGovernance('test-results/api-functional-report.json','test-results')})().catch(console.error)"
scripts.api:inventory: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f='test-results/api-inventory.json';if(fs.existsSync(f))console.log(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));else console.log('Run npm run api:discover first')"
scripts.api:smoke-report: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f='test-results/api-smoke-report.json';if(fs.existsSync(f))console.log(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));else console.log('Run npm run api:smoke-tests first')"
scripts.api:functional-report: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f='test-results/api-functional-report.json';if(fs.existsSync(f))console.log(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));else console.log('Run npm run api:full-pipeline first')"
scripts.discover:generate-inventory: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { ComponentDiscoveryService } from './src/infrastructure/discovery'; new ComponentDiscoveryService('./src', '.').discoverAll().then(()=>process.exit(0)).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
scripts.test:results:view: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='test-results/test-execution-report.json';if(fs.existsSync(f)){const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));console.log(JSON.stringify(r,null,2))}else console.log('No test results found')"
scripts.test:results:severity: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='test-results/test-results-by-severity.json';if(fs.existsSync(f)){const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8'));console.log(JSON.stringify(r,null,2))}else console.log('Run npm run test:comprehensive first')"
scripts.test:technical: npm run build && node scripts/run-technical-tests.mjs FULL
scripts.test:technical:critical: npm run build && node scripts/run-technical-tests.mjs CRITICAL
scripts.test:technical:smoke: npm run build && node scripts/run-technical-tests.mjs SMOKE
scripts.test:technical:verbose: npm run build && node scripts/run-technical-tests.mjs FULL --verbose
scripts.test:nav:all: npm run test:nav && npm run test:nav:api
scripts.test:nav:verify: npm run sync:tests && npm run test:nav:all
scripts.report:html: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "import { HtmlReportGenerator } from './src/test/reports'; const args = process.argv.slice(2); const dir = args[0] || 'test-results/latest'; new HtmlReportGenerator(dir).generate().then(() => console.log('✅ Report generated')).catch(console.error)"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
